effects.effect: Your Opponent's next Recharge Charges -1 FP.

effects.name: Shady Deals
effects.effect: Once per turn: You can discard 1 card from your FP Zone; your Opponent discards 1 card from their FP Zone.

effects.name: Dilopho Combo
effects.effect: Your Opponent reveals their hand and must place 1 Vivosaur from their hand into their FP Zone. If they cannot, deal 50 damage to a Vivosaur your opponent controls.
